# Summary

<!-- 1–2 sentences on what this PR does and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat: new behaviour
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: internal change, no behaviour change
- [ ] perf: measurable perf improvement
- [ ] docs: documentation only
- [ ] test: tests only
- [ ] chore / ci / deps: tooling / dependency / pipeline

## Related

Closes #

## Testing

<!-- Exact commands you ran and their output summary. -->

- [ ] `cargo test --package shain --test test_shain` (all 9 pass)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -W warnings`

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated a test that proves this change
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased**
- [ ] I updated documentation if the public surface changed
- [ ] No mainnet contract address, real audit badge, or fake partner logos
      have been added
